hero.title: Manage Printouts and Printers
hero.subtitle: TomboPrint is a secure, scalable and modern print management platform to help solve challenges in document printing in the modern enterprise.

features.title: Features for Every Need
features.subtitle: From security to cloud, from monitoring to analytics — all print management in one platform.
features.f1_desc: Control access with cards and PINs. Ensure privacy and support roaming users.
features.f2_desc: Track by user or department, apply quotas, and generate detailed reports.
features.f3_desc: Monitor toner and paper, receive alerts, and auto-create support tickets.
features.f4_desc: Print from anywhere with cloud integration and mobile app support.
features.f5_desc: Document scanning and integration with document management systems.
features.f6_desc: Configure, control, and update your entire printer fleet from one dashboard.

solutions.title: Solutions by Industry
solutions.subtitle: From healthcare to education, finance to government — TomboPrint meets every sector's needs.

blog.title: Blog & Resources
blog.subtitle: Latest insights on print management, security, and digital transformation.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: At TomboPrint, we make enterprise print management smarter, safer and more sustainable.
about.mission_text: To give businesses full control over their printer infrastructure — reducing costs, improving security, and maximizing operational efficiency.
